---
title: "test_memory_partitioning.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\unit\test_memory_partitioning.py"
loc: 41
complexity: 4
logic_score: 4.90
style_score: 3.67
intel_score: 5.30
overall_score: 3.76
---

## Intent
The `test_memory_partitioning.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestMemoryPartitioning, setUp, tearDown, test_context_isolation, test_prefix_stripping. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestMemoryPartitioning, setUp, tearDown, test_context_isolation, test_prefix_stripping. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [src.core.engine.memory_db](file://src.core.engine.memory_db)
- [uuid](file://uuid)
- [gc](file://gc)

### Exports
- `TestMemoryPartitioning`
- `setUp`
- `tearDown`
- `test_context_isolation`
- `test_prefix_stripping`
